title: Run verification suite
summary: Execute the verification suite to confirm changes are correct and ready for release.
acceptance_criteria: Verification suite is executed successfully or failures are recorded with notes.
Results are captured in notes for downstream review.
Execution aligns with project verification workflow.

steps.description: Run the verification suite according to the project’s standard process.
Record the outcome and any failures with concise notes.
Confirm readiness to proceed to acceptance criteria review.
